title: The Elemental Uprising
description: Fire elementals are becoming increasingly aggressive. Something is driving them mad.

stages.text: Geologist Marda meets you on the flats, her instruments smoking. 'The elementals have always been territorial, but this is different. They're organized. Attacking in waves. Something is coordinating them — something underground.' She shows you readings of a massive energy signature beneath the Scorched Flats. 'I need someone to investigate. The Magma Pits entrance is the only way down.'

choices.label: Study the energy readings for a pattern
Head straight for the energy source

stages.text: Beneath the flats, you find the source — a massive crystal of pure elemental fire, cracked and leaking energy. The crack is artificial — someone deliberately damaged it. Cultist tools lie nearby. The crystal is driving the elementals into a frenzy as it bleeds out.

choices.label: Destroy it to stop the emanations

stages.text: The crystal stabilizes. The elemental frenzy subsides. Marda's instruments go quiet for the first time in weeks. 'You did it. The flats are safe again — well, as safe as a volcanic wasteland ever is.' She hands you materials recovered from the crystal chamber.
